description: Hardcoded error message in server environment check could benefit from more descriptive guidance
suggested_fix: Enhance the error message to suggest common solutions like setting isServer=true or allowOutsideOfServer=true in the config
Remove deprecated export in v12 as indicated by the deprecation comment

description: TRPCError constructor doesn't validate that opts.code is a valid TRPC_ERROR_CODE_KEY
suggested_fix: Add validation to ensure code is one of the defined error codes to prevent typos

description: TS-ignore comments indicate potential type system limitations
suggested_fix: Investigate if Error cause parameter can be properly typed without ts-ignore

description: Express middleware error handling relies on internal_exceptionHandler without explicit error logging
suggested_fix: Add explicit error logging before passing to internal_exceptionHandler

description: AWS Lambda handlers create planner on every invocation without caching
suggested_fix: Consider caching planner creation for repeated use in same lambda invocation

description: Lazy router loading error message could be more specific about module structure
suggested_fix: Improve error message to clearly explain expected module exports format

description: Environment variable access for NODE_ENV doesn't have validation
suggested_fix: Add validation to ensure NODE_ENV is a valid string before comparison

description: Empty router object uses null assertions which could fail at runtime
suggested_fix: Replace null assertions with proper runtime validation

description: Config object creation mixes runtime values with type-only properties
suggested_fix: Separate type-only properties from runtime config more clearly
